summary.lv: Magnetiq Bank meklē vecāko sistēmu administratoru ar 5+ gadu pieredzi IT infrastruktūras administrēšanā, kurš pārvaldīs serveru, tīklu un virtualizācijas vidi bankas IT vidē.
summary.en: Magnetiq Bank is looking for a Senior Systems Administrator with 5+ years of IT infrastructure experience to manage servers, networks, and virtualization environment in a banking IT setting.
